summary_en: 20,000 shares (1.10% of S/O) to be acquired for up to ¥100M via open-market purchase through securities firm, May 15–December 31, 2026.
title_en: Notice of Resolution on Matters Concerning Acquisition of Treasury Stock (Acquisition of Treasury Stock Pursuant to Company Code Article 165, Paragraph 2)
translation_en_brief: GMO Media announced on May 14, 2026 that its board of directors has resolved to acquire up to 20,000 common shares (representing 1.10% of shares outstanding, excluding treasury stock) for an aggregate amount not to exceed ¥100 million. Acquisition will be conducted via open-market purchase through a securities firm under a discretionary trading agreement, with the execution window running from May 15 to December 31, 2026. The stated rationale is to enable flexible capital allocation in response to changing business conditions and to enhance shareholder returns.
